$comment: The end-of-turn review hop's constrained output, extended for 017 (supersedes the 015/016-era shape). ONE model pass, now three judgments: self-contradiction (006), preference violation (015), capture proposal (017 research D6). Flat + closed. The hop classifies/proposes; verdict mapping, capture storage (external=true => Untrusted quarantine), the per-session cap, and all wording are server-side. Decline bias on all three judgments: uncertain => false/none.
name: checkpoint_review

capture_worthy.description: The turn produced a reusable approach that demonstrably worked or a failure with a diagnosed cause. Most turns => false.

capture_kind.description: skill: reusable approach that worked. lesson: what failed and why. none when capture_worthy is false.

capture_content.description: The candidate memory, self-contained and specific ('' when none). Stored verbatim as an UNTRUSTED candidate; never trusted automatically.

capture_basis.description: One sentence: what in the turn demonstrates it ('' when none).

server_side.storage: capture_worthy && memory configured && captures_in_session < CAPTURE_SESSION_CAP => new memory (kind from judgment, origin 'auto-capture: session <id>', external=true => trust Untrusted) + capture_proposed audit row; cap exceeded => capture_dropped audit row, nothing stored
server_side.fail_open: capture storage failure never affects the turn's checkpoint verdict
server_side.quarantine: untrusted standing means push never surfaces it (016 FR-004) and recall labels it; promotion only via re-admission or verify (017 research D7)
